src: A gray and white cat with short fur, bright golden eyes, long white whiskers, black nose, and a white chest patch. Its ears are pointed.
edit: A knitted animal from two-colored yarn: deep charcoal gray and vibrant pure white, patterned like fur. Its eyes are amber buttons. The yarn textures mimic the plush, natural elegance of a feline.

per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-T0kalkwgc0w-unsplash: The object is sitting upright on a wooden floor, head tilted slightly upwards, with visible wood grains and shadows beneath it, in an indistinct, neutral surrounding.
per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-uamiRCpAmrU-unsplash: the object is lying on a bed with patterned green and white sheets, front paws visible. The surface is soft and slightly crumpled, with blurred natural elements in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.erik-jan-leusink-x01ntt6tNDc-unsplash: the object is nestled against a gray textured cushion with a tight weave, its head resting comfortably, in softly lit natural light casting gentle shadows.

per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-T0kalkwgc0w-unsplash: The object sits upright on an autumn-toned floor, head tilted upwards. The surface has burnt orange and crimson hues. Nearby is a slightly blurred background with warm earth tones and burnt umber.
per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-uamiRCpAmrU-unsplash: The object lies on a bed with autumn-patterned sheets in amber and russet. Its front paws rest on the soft, crumpled surface. In the background, blurred natural elements suggest an autumn theme.
per_image_non_shared_edit.erik-jan-leusink-x01ntt6tNDc-unsplash: The object is nestled against a cushion with autumnal tones and golden leaf patterns. Its head rests comfortably on the cushion. The scene is warmly lit with golden sunlight creating shadows.

prompt_shared: an animal knitted from a two-colored yarn
